About This Project

Prestige Falcon City is a landmark residential project off Electronics City. Spread across 50 acres with over 2000 apartments. Features include a massive clubhouse, sports facilities, and a retail complex within the campus.

Amenities

ClubhouseSwimming PoolGymTennis CourtBasketball CourtJogging TrackKids Play AreaRetail
